Happy Birthday Yoyooooooo!

🎉 Happy Birthday Aya!

From the moment I met you, something changed — like the world quietly rearranged itself to make room for someone extraordinary.

You make ordinary days feel like something worth remembering. You bring warmth to every room, and light to every moment. 🌸

Today is yours — I hope it's as magical as you are. ✨

– Always, Yousef 💕

To You! 🎁
Happy Birthday, Aya! 💕

From the moment we met, something in my life shifted — like the universe quietly guiding me toward someone meant for me.

You brought warmth into the parts of me I didn't even know were cold. And you expanded my days with a dimension I can only call my own.

Your friend always, Yousef 🌸
